label: 208 Repealed. , , ]Pub. L. 91–482, § 1(b)84 Stat. 1082Oct. 21, 1970
notes: Section, , , , provided that an officer furloughed under , Armed Forces, was entitled to pay at the rate of one-half of the basic pay to which he was entitled at the time of being furloughed.Pub. L. 87–64976 Stat. 461section 6406 of Title 10Sept. 7, 1962

Pension Continuation Provision, , , provided that:Pub. L. 91–482, § 384 Stat. 1082Oct. 21, 1970“Notwithstanding the first section of this Act [repealing this section and sections 4539, 4623, 5981, 6159, and 6406 of Title 10, Armed Forces], a person who is entitled to a pension under [former] , United States Code, on the day before the date of enactment of this Act [] shall continue to be entitled to that pension on and after that date of enactment.”section 6159 of title 10Oct. 21, 1970
